Call ID: EXT-013
Type: external
Date: 2026-06-10
Topic: Product Feedback
Participants: Owen (account manager); Devin (customer)
------------------------------------------------------------
AM (Owen): Hi Devin, thanks for making time today. How are things going on your side?
Customer (Devin): The reporting is powerful but the learning curve is steep.
AM (Owen): Let me connect you with our product team for a feedback session.
Customer (Devin): That would help. Our leadership pays close attention to this.
AM (Owen): That's really useful — I'll get this to product with your context.
Customer (Devin): I feel better about the direction. Let's check in again soon.
AM (Owen): Thank you — I'll send a recap with clear next steps and owners by end of day.
